title: Migration Candidate
description: Schema for Helios to Carbon Web Components migration candidate records

id.description: Unique identifier for this migration candidate

filePath.description: Relative path from workspace root to the file containing the component

line.description: Line number where the component usage starts (1-based)

heliosComponent.description: Name of the Helios component being migrated

proposedCwcComponent.description: Target Carbon Web Component name, or null if no equivalent exists

transformOperations.description: List of transformation operations to apply

from.description: Source attribute, event, or tag name

to.description: Target attribute, event, or tag name

valueMap.description: Mapping of source values to target values

notes.description: Additional context or instructions for this operation

confidence.description: Confidence score for this migration (0.0 to 1.0)

riskFlags.description: List of risk identifiers for this migration

status.description: Migration status: planned (auto-apply), manual (requires review), or skipped (cannot migrate)

rationale.description: Explanation for the confidence score and status decision

manualNotes.description: Additional notes for manual review or follow-up actions

high.description: High confidence (>= 0.90): Complete mapping, no risk flags, simple usage

medium.description: Medium confidence (0.60-0.89): Partial mapping, minor risk flags, or complex usage

low.description: Low confidence (< 0.60): Incomplete mapping, major risk flags, or parse failures

statusRules.manual: Medium/low confidence or has risk flags requiring human review
statusRules.skipped: Parse failure, missing context, or prohibited operation detected
